meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-impact user onboarding to overcome a lack of portfolio. An Intermediate-level tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To solve the 'no portfolio' dilemma, build a sophisticated user onboarding flow that demonstrates product-thinking and technical empathy. By implementing a frictionless, personalized sign-up experience using Antigravity and Claude Code, you showcase your ability to convert users, a high-value skill that separates junior developers from elite AI-powered builders.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank screen of your GitHub profile, a digital void where a career should be. The job market doesn't care about your potential; it cares about the problems you've solved. Every recruiter ignores the 'ToDo List' app clone, but they stop scrolling when they see a product that solves real-world friction. 

User onboarding is the heartbeat of any SaaS. It is the bridge between a curious visitor and a loyal user. By mastering this, you aren't just writing code—you are architecting human behavior. Let’s transform your profile from a graveyard of tutorials into a showcase of high-converting, professional-grade engineering.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the friction points. We need a flow that captures user intent immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a 3-step onboarding flow including user preferences, goal setting, and a final value proposition screen.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate user_journey.json schema for a SaaS onboarding flow'

steps.title: Architecting the State Machine
steps.description: Onboarding is complex state management. We use a finite state machine to prevent UI bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine implementation using XState that handles onboarding transitions and data persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts --logic 'XState machine for onboarding steps'

steps.title: Implementing Progressive Profiling
steps.description: Don't overwhelm users. Ask for data only when necessary to increase conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React component for progressive profiling that saves user data to local storage before a final database push.

steps.title: Integrating Analytics Hooks
steps.description: You can't optimize what you don't measure. Add telemetry to your onboarding steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a telemetry hook that tracks user drop-off rates at each step of the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file src/utils/analytics.ts --logic 'Track onboarding conversion events'

steps.title: Final Polish and UI/UX Refinement
steps.description: Add micro-interactions to make the onboarding feel premium and responsive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply Framer Motion animations to the onboarding transitions for a smooth, high-end feel.

pro_tips: Always store progress in localStorage so users can refresh without losing their data.
Use skeleton loaders during data submission to make the app feel faster than it is.
Add a 'skip' option for power users to prevent frustration, but track who skips for analytics.
Include a 'Value Proposition' slide in the middle of onboarding to remind them why they signed up.
Use console.table() to debug your onboarding state object in real-time during development.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to Vercel, share the live link on LinkedIn with a breakdown of your conversion strategy, and start iterating based on real user feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. By building this onboarding flow, you demonstrate the exact skills companies pay top dollar for: user retention, data-driven design, and clean architecture. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
